description: Lush sweet, ripe berry gummies made with a chef’s touch — vivid fruit flavor, a melt-into-chew texture, and a cannabis infusion blended cleanly into every bite. It blends CBN to help you relax and ease into rest, CBD to keep things calm and balanced, and THC for a classic euphoric lift in a 20:10:1 ratio. Rich on flavor and easy to enjoy — start with a comfortable serving and let the edible do the rest.
